changes_made: No code changes required - all reviewed files meet quality standards

findings.assessment: COPILOT_SELECTION_LIST_PATTERN is well-defined with no ReDoS risk, no /g flag (S4-5 compliant), JSDoc follows existing pattern conventions. buildDetectPromptOptions copilot case is consistent with claude/opencode pattern.

getCopilotBuiltinCommands() returns properly typed SlashCommand array with source='builtin'. Integration into getSlashCommandGroups() correctly places builtins in low-priority deduplication array. Both basePath and cache branches include copilot builtins.

Step 1.6 copilot selection list detection follows same pattern as step 1.5 (Claude). STATUS_REASON.COPILOT_SELECTION_LIST added consistently. SELECTION_LIST_REASONS Set includes all three selection list reasons. cliToolId guard prevents false positives (DR2-004).
Uses SELECTION_LIST_REASONS.has() which automatically includes the new copilot reason without code changes. DRY-compliant extensibility (DR1-004).
SlashCommandSource already includes 'builtin' type. No changes needed.
Good coverage with positive matches (arrows to move, arrow keys to navigate), multiline content, and negative cases. Global flag check included.

Tests cover COPILOT_SELECTION_LIST constant export, SELECTION_LIST_REASONS Set membership (3 entries), copilot selection list detection with cliToolId guard, and negative test for cross-tool false positives.
Tests cover getCopilotBuiltinCommands return type, /model command properties, cliTools=['copilot'], and source='builtin'.

principles_checked.SOLID: SRP maintained - each module has clear responsibility. OCP satisfied via SELECTION_LIST_REASONS Set for extensibility.
principles_checked.DRY: No duplication detected. SELECTION_LIST_REASONS Set eliminates OR-chain duplication.
principles_checked.KISS: Implementation follows established patterns without unnecessary complexity.
principles_checked.YAGNI: Only necessary features added (single /model builtin, one selection list pattern).

security_checked.ReDoS: COPILOT_SELECTION_LIST_PATTERN has no nested quantifiers (SEC4-001 compliant).
security_checked.injection: No user input directly used in regex construction.
